description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image, caches the node_modules/ directory, and defines the variables DATABASE_URL, HEROKU_API_KEY and MYSQL_USERNAME. Define a test stage with a test job that runs "npm install" then "npm run-script report", and a test-with-artifact job that runs "npm install" then "npm run-script test-coverage", runs only on the master branch, and uploads the coverage/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a develop job that runs only on the develop branch and executes "apt-get update -qy", "apt-get install -y rubygems", "gem install dpl" and "dpl --provider=heroku --app=auto-personalia-development --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY" to deploy to Heroku. Also add a staging job that runs only on master and runs the same apt and dpl commands but with "--app=auto-personalia-staging" to deploy to the staging Heroku app. Finally add a pages job that runs only on master, depends on test-with-artifact, moves the generated coverage report with "mv coverage/lcov-report/ public/", and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
